news.title:
Kotak Mahindra AMC's $3B fund bets on defense, financial stocks, with Astra Microwave, Bharat Electronics as key holdings.
Defense firms gain from policy support, while financials like HDFC Bank, IndusInd Bank, and Bajaj Finance attract post-selloff interest.
news.summary:
Kotak Mahindra AMC's $3B fund bets on defense, financial stocks, with Astra Microwave, Bharat Electronics as key holdings.
Defense firms gain from policy support, while financials like HDFC Bank, IndusInd Bank, and Bajaj Finance attract post-selloff interest.

news.title:
Astra Microwave, Solar Industries, and Zen Technologies benefit from India's Rs 2.38 lakh crore defence approvals.
Astra leads in radar/missile systems, Solar excels in artillery/missiles, and Zen drives UAV/anti-drone tech growth.
news.summary:
Astra Microwave, Solar Industries, and Zen Technologies benefit from India's Rs 2.38 lakh crore defence approvals.
Astra leads in radar/missile systems, Solar excels in artillery/missiles, and Zen drives UAV/anti-drone tech growth.

news.title:
Astra Microwave's board approved demerger of Space, Meteorology, Hydrology biz.
MD S. Gurunatha Reddy to step down by Sept 30, 2026; Dr. M.V. Reddy to succeed.
news.summary:
Astra Microwave's board approved demerger of Space, Meteorology, Hydrology biz.
MD S. Gurunatha Reddy to step down by Sept 30, 2026; Dr. M.V. Reddy to succeed.

news.title:
Astra Microwave's joint venture wins Rs 250 crore Hindustan Aeronautics order.
The update lacks analysis or commentary, as stated in the disclaimer.
news.summary:
Astra Microwave's joint venture wins Rs 250 crore Hindustan Aeronautics order.
The update lacks analysis or commentary, as stated in the disclaimer.

news.title:
Astra Microwave JV bags Rs. 250.6 crore order from HAL for SDR supply.
Order execution is within 18 months; not a related party transaction.
news.summary:
Astra Microwave JV bags Rs. 250.6 crore order from HAL for SDR supply.
Order execution is within 18 months; not a related party transaction.

news.title:
Astra Microwave focuses on defence electronics with a Rs 2,226 crore order book and Rs 30,000 crore market opportunity over four years.
FY26 revenue is expected at Rs 1,150 crore, driven by defence orders, export growth, and transitioning to system-level manufacturing.
news.summary:
Astra Microwave focuses on defence electronics with a Rs 2,226 crore order book and Rs 30,000 crore market opportunity over four years.
FY26 revenue is expected at Rs 1,150 crore, driven by defence orders, export growth, and transitioning to system-level manufacturing.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal retains Buy on Astra Microwave with ₹1,150 target, citing global defense spending boost.
Middle East tensions aid procurement/export, but supply chain issues may delay execution.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal retains Buy on Astra Microwave with ₹1,150 target, citing global defense spending boost.
Middle East tensions aid procurement/export, but supply chain issues may delay execution.

news.title:
Astra Microwave disclosed SEBI's communication on info sought for FY 2023-24 financial results.
SEBI requested insider, SDD, and event details; Astra responded on 6 March 2026.
news.summary:
Astra Microwave disclosed SEBI's communication on info sought for FY 2023-24 financial results.
SEBI requested insider, SDD, and event details; Astra responded on 6 March 2026.

news.title:
Astra Micro receives approval to demerge its space, meteorology, and hydrology business.
CNBC TV18 reports on Astra Micro's strategic business restructuring initiative.
news.summary:
Astra Micro receives approval to demerge its space, meteorology, and hydrology business.
CNBC TV18 reports on Astra Micro's strategic business restructuring initiative.

news.title:
Astra Microwave's board approves exploring demerger into Defence and Space focused firms.
Completion targeted by Q1 FY28 to unlock shareholder value and enable focused strategies.
news.summary:
Astra Microwave's board approves exploring demerger into Defence and Space focused firms.
Completion targeted by Q1 FY28 to unlock shareholder value and enable focused strategies.

news.title:
Astra Microwave's board approves separating space, meteorology, and hydrology units.
The move aims to improve management and operational efficiency.
news.summary:
Astra Microwave's board approves separating space, meteorology, and hydrology units.
The move aims to improve management and operational efficiency.

news.title:
Defence stocks like BEL, BDL, HAL rallied amid PM Modi's Israel visit, driven by joint venture potential and tech partnerships.
Astra Microwave surged 5.7%, while BEL, BDL, and HAL rose 2-3%. India's defence exports hit ₹23,000 crore; FY25 production at ₹1.5 lakh crore.
news.summary:
Defence stocks like BEL, BDL, HAL rallied amid PM Modi's Israel visit, driven by joint venture potential and tech partnerships.
Astra Microwave surged 5.7%, while BEL, BDL, and HAL rose 2-3%. India's defence exports hit ₹23,000 crore; FY25 production at ₹1.5 lakh crore.

news.title:
Astra Microwave posted its best Q3 with ₹258cr revenue, ₹80cr EBITDA at 30.9% margin.
9M revenue reached ₹668cr, PAT margin 10.9%. Order book at ₹2,226cr, MoU signed with BEL.
news.summary:
Astra Microwave posted its best Q3 with ₹258cr revenue, ₹80cr EBITDA at 30.9% margin.
9M revenue reached ₹668cr, PAT margin 10.9%. Order book at ₹2,226cr, MoU signed with BEL.

news.title:
Astra Microwave shows improved revenue, profit margins, and steady order book.
Collaboration with Bharat Electronics boosts defence tech; FY26 targets align with order inflows.
news.summary:
Astra Microwave shows improved revenue, profit margins, and steady order book.
Collaboration with Bharat Electronics boosts defence tech; FY26 targets align with order inflows.

news.title:
Astra Microwave CFO Rahul Rungta resigned on Feb 11, 2026.
Srinivasarao Devathi, with 22 years of experience, appointed CFO from Feb 12, 2026.
news.summary:
Astra Microwave CFO Rahul Rungta resigned on Feb 11, 2026.
Srinivasarao Devathi, with 22 years of experience, appointed CFO from Feb 12, 2026.

news.title: Astra Microwave Products reported Q3 revenue at ₹2.6B, unchanged YoY.
news.summary: Astra Microwave Products reported Q3 revenue at ₹2.6B, unchanged YoY.

news.title:
Astra Microwave will hold a board meeting on Feb 12, 2026, to review Q3 and 9-month unaudited financial results.
Trading window closure is from Jan 1 to Feb 14, 2026, as per insider trading regulations.
news.summary:
Astra Microwave will hold a board meeting on Feb 12, 2026, to review Q3 and 9-month unaudited financial results.
Trading window closure is from Jan 1 to Feb 14, 2026, as per insider trading regulations.

news.title:
Budget 2026 may boost defence capex by 20%, benefiting stocks like BEL, Mazagon Dock, HAL, and BDL.
Focus areas include UAVs, missiles, and shipbuilding; Rs 10,000 crore Drone Shakti Mission and Sagarmala 2.0 to drive growth.
news.summary:
Budget 2026 may boost defence capex by 20%, benefiting stocks like BEL, Mazagon Dock, HAL, and BDL.
Focus areas include UAVs, missiles, and shipbuilding; Rs 10,000 crore Drone Shakti Mission and Sagarmala 2.0 to drive growth.

news.title: Astra Microwave JV secures a significant order worth ₹2.75 billion.
news.summary: Astra Microwave JV secures a significant order worth ₹2.75 billion.

news.title:
Astra Rafael Comsys, a JV of Astra Microwave, secured a Rs. 275.3 crore order from the Indian Air Force.
The order includes SDR integration on MiG-29, NCO installation, and 24 SDRs for LCA Mk 1A aircraft.
news.summary:
Astra Rafael Comsys, a JV of Astra Microwave, secured a Rs. 275.3 crore order from the Indian Air Force.
The order includes SDR integration on MiG-29, NCO installation, and 24 SDRs for LCA Mk 1A aircraft.
